headline: Genesis Draw
subhead: Devnet rehearsal — how PEPEBALL works, with hard-linked Solscan proof

steps.title: Hold & qualify
steps.body: No ticket purchase. Combined USD across game mints at snapshot: $20 = 1 ticket, $100 = 2, $500 = 4 max. Wallets register on-chain before the draw.

steps.title: Holdings snapshot + Pepe draw
steps.body: Game-day admin runs take_snapshot on the lottery program. Pepe ball count (1–30) is derived on-chain. Odd = payout round. Even = rollover.

steps.title: Winner index (VRF)
steps.body: Snapshot seed expands the ticket pool. One winning index is selected and written on-chain — main winner + 8 minors.

steps.title: SOL payout (ODD)
steps.body: Lamports leave the jackpot_tax wallet: 50% main, 8×5% minors, 8% stays as rollover reserve, 2% dev. Every transfer is a separate on-chain tx you can verify.

steps.title: On-chain round reset
steps.body: payout_winners clears lottery state for the next round — participants reset, rollover counter zeroed, ready for the next cycle.
